data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for external-to-internal entity link mapping.
data.assessment: The exploratory step requires validation of the external-to-internal entity link mapping, but the evidence provided does not include any specific details or endpoints that confirm this mapping exists or functions correctly. The linked use case mentions the need for this functionality, yet no concrete evidence is available to support its implementation or operation. Therefore, the validation is inconclusive due to a lack of necessary evidence.
gaps: No evidence of external-to-internal entity link mapping.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
